evals.prompt: I have results from an Ersilia screening run: `/Users/mduranfrigola/Documents/GitHub/claude-ersilia-skills/skills/molecule-auditing/assets/drugbank_head_example.csv`. Can you audit these molecules and tell me which ones look most promising for antibiotic drug discovery?
evals.expected_output: A Markdown audit report with model metadata fetched from GitHub, molecules classified as Promising/Borderline/Deprioritise, a top candidates table, and a score distribution section. The report should cite eos4e40 (antibiotic model) and eos7m30 (ADMET) metadata including their Interpretation field.
assertions: The report contains a table of top candidate molecules with key/SMILES identifiers and activity scores
Molecules are classified into Promising, Borderline, and Deprioritise categories with counts
The report cites metadata from eos4e40 including the model title or interpretation (e.g. E.coli growth inhibition)
The processing script (process_molecules.py) was executed via Bash to produce audit_summary.json
The report includes a Score Distribution section describing the spread of values

evals.prompt: Run the molecule auditing skill on `/Users/mduranfrigola/Documents/GitHub/claude-ersilia-skills/skills/molecule-auditing/assets/drugbank_head_example.csv --context 'E. coli antibiotics' --output /tmp/audit_ec.md`. I want the top hits from this E.coli inhibition screen.
evals.expected_output: A Markdown audit report saved to /tmp/audit_ec.md, using the E.coli antibiotics context. The report should prioritise molecules by their eos4e40 (antibiotic activity) score, and explicitly mention the therapeutic context in the report header.
assertions: The report is written to /tmp/audit_ec.md (or the agent produces a file at that path)
The context 'E. coli antibiotics' (or equivalent) is reflected in the report header or Overview section
The top candidates section identifies specific molecules by key or SMILES with their antibiotic activity scores
The processing script (process_molecules.py) was run with --context and --output flags
The report contains a Caveats section

evals.prompt: I just ran Ersilia on a compound library and got this file: `/Users/mduranfrigola/Documents/GitHub/claude-ersilia-skills/skills/molecule-auditing/assets/drugbank_head_example.csv`. Can you look at these molecules and help me figure out which ones to prioritize and which ones to drop? Not sure what all the columns mean.
evals.expected_output: A Markdown audit report that decodes the Ersilia model column names into human-readable descriptions, explains what the scores mean, and provides actionable prioritisation (which molecules to advance vs. deprioritise). Should not leave raw column names unexplained.
assertions: The report explains what the model score columns mean in plain language (not just raw column names like 'inhibition_50um.eos4e40')
The report provides a clear recommendation of which molecules to prioritize and which to drop
Model metadata is fetched from GitHub to populate explanations (not just guessed)
The top candidates table includes at least 5 molecules with scores and classification
The skill is properly triggered and the full auditing workflow is followed (not just a brief summary)
